name: JLCImport-Imp
description: KiCad plugin to import JLCPCB/LCSC parts, auto-contributing to imp-kicad-lib with naming conventions and dedupe.
description_full: Fork of jvanderberg/kicad_jlcimport that integrates with the impossible-inc/imp-kicad-lib shared component library: discovers the lib as a project submodule, categorizes parts, reformats symbols to match the lib's conventions (proper Reference, hidden Value, purple _1_1 value annotation), checks for same-spec duplicates before writing, and optionally commits+pushes new parts to the shared library.
